description: Verify and fix the Docker Compose test stack until all services start healthy and the full unit+integration test suite passes

userStories.title: Docker Compose stack starts healthy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml up --build -d` to result in all three services (control-plane, slack-relay, scheduler) running healthy with no crashes.
acceptanceCriteria: `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml ps` shows claw-cp-test as healthy
`docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml ps` shows claw-relay-test as healthy
`docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml ps` shows claw-scheduler-test as running (no exit/restart)
docker logs claw-cp-test shows no Fatal/Error lines
docker logs claw-relay-test shows no Fatal/Error lines
Tear down with `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml down -v` exits code 0
userStories.notes: The stack is nearly working. The last known state: control-plane and slack-relay were marked healthy, scheduler was running. The Dockerfile uses node:22-bookworm-slim as base with openssl installed. Prisma client copy-all strategy (`find /app/node_modules/.pnpm -path '*/@prisma+client@*/node_modules/.prisma/client' -type d -exec sh -c 'cp -r ...' ...`) is the current approach in docker/Dockerfile. The compose file uses ports 13200:3200 and 13101:3101 to avoid conflicts with the live host services on 3200/3101. DATABASE_URL is file:/data/tenants/orchestrator.db inside containers. The DATABASE_URL in the project .env must NOT override this in compose — the compose file sets DATABASE_URL in the environment block explicitly. Run `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.test.yml down -v` before each test attempt to ensure a clean state.

userStories.title: Full test suite passes on host
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `pnpm test` (the full vitest test suite) to pass with no failures after all Dockerfile and source changes are committed.
userStories.notes: The test suite runs on the host (not inside Docker). Run from /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/claw-orchestrator. Tests use SQLite in /tmp and mock Docker — they do not need the Docker Compose stack to be up. If tests were passing before this branch, they should still pass. Fix any regressions introduced by the type annotation changes to app-factory.ts.

userStories.title: Dockerfile and compose changes committed and pushed
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all working Dockerfile and docker-compose.test.yml changes committed to the branch and pushed to the PR.
acceptanceCriteria: git status shows clean working tree
git log shows commits for all Dockerfile and compose fixes
userStories.notes: Branch is ralph/docker-compose-and-contract-tests. Remote is origin (https://github.com/iamsteveng/claw-orchestrator.git). PR #7 already exists for this branch.
